locations.name: Upper Guinean forests
locations.summary: The Upper Guinean forests is a tropical seasonal forest region of West Africa.

locations.name: 剛果雨林
locations.summary: 刚果雨林是一条横贯中部非洲的刚果河流域及其支流区域的常绿阔叶林帶。刚果雨林是仅次于亞馬遜雨林的世界第二大熱帶森林，其面积超过500,000,000英畝（2,000,000平方公里），覆盖六个国家，占全球现存热带森林的四分之一。该地区拥有世…

relations.subject: Bates's sunbird

relations.evidence: Bates's sunbird (Cinnyris batesi) is a species of sunbird in the family Nectariniidae which occurs in Western African forests and Central African rainforests, and locally in other types of forest in Central Africa
